failure_event.notes: Vibration rose from 2.9 to 8.5 mm/s over 68h. Bearing temp +16°C. Spindle current spikes from h+40 onward. Bearing seized at 06:15 local. Pattern: gradual rise weeks 1-2, exponential acceleration final 12h.
failure_event.similarity_to_CNC_07_LEI: HIGH — vibration trajectory, temp delta, and current spike pattern are consistent. CNC-07-LEI currently at h-minus-60 equivalent position on the CNC-03-LEI curve.
